titleStmt.title: SII 15.142: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 142. (B.K. No. 149 of 1928-29.) KAṬGĒRI, BADAMI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into the front wall of Nārāyaṇadēva temple.

After giving an account of the Kalachuri house, the epigraph recounts the genealogy of the Sinda chiefs. The Sinda feudatories, Vīra-Bijjala and Vīra-Vikramāditya, are stated to have been governing the areas of Bāgaḍage Seventy, Kisukāḍu Seventy, Hamgarage Twelve and Nareyamgal Twelve from their capital Erambaravi. The record describes the agrahāra of Kaḍakeṟe and its Five Hundred Mahājanas and registers a gift of land by Mahāpradhāna Tējirāja-daṇḍanāyaka on the occasion of the visit of Mahādēva-daṇḍanāyaka. On account of the damaged condition of the inscription, the details of the date and other portions cannot be made out.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namaḥ śāśvatikānaṁdajñānaiśva¨ryyamayātmanē saṁkaḷpa sakaḷabrahmastaṁbhāraṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . ©
dbrahmā brāhmaṇānvēdaguptayē tṛptya¨rtthaṁ pitṛdēvānāṁ dha¨rmma saṁrakṣaṇāya ca . śivāya .
tprakarastutyamadhyalōkavaṁtadaṟoḷu rōdastaḷa paricuṁbita vīcistōmaṁ lavaṇavādīkara vesedikku . ©
ppesuttuvire jaṁbūdvīpa voppippudā cārudvīpada madhyadoḷu kanakadhā trīṁdraṁ manaṁgoḷvudāmēru¨rvvīṁdra
cā śrīdēviyābhāra śrīrāmāvarakuṁtaḷaṁ bolesaguṁ śrī kuṁtaḷō¨rvvī taḷaṁ . suruci
kaḷacuricakrava¨rttiyenisi saṁkamadēvanaranāthaṁ pogaḷa jagavellaṁ . dore vetta tadanvayamīśvarāṁ
ṣabadhvajadiṁ vīraḍamarukatū¨ryyadinoppire kaḷacuri bhūparalli palabaru vesayal . mattamalli . jana
tanayaṁ rājalaṁ rājalo¨rvvīśana taṁmaṁ bijjalaṁ bijjalanṛpana sutaṁ jōgamaṁ jōgamō¨rvvīśana putraṁ pe¨rmmā
bijjalō¨rvvīśana tōkaṁ sōvidēvaṁ tadanujanadaṭiṁ saṁkama kṣōṇigīśaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśra
hārājādhirājaparamēśvaraṁ kāḷāṁjarapuravarādhīśvaraṁ suva¨rṇna vṛṣabhadhvajaṁ ḍamarukatū¨ryyani
kaḷacurikuḷakamaḷamā¨rttaṁḍaṁ mānakanakācaḷaṁ subhaṭarādityaṁ kaligaḷaṁkusaṁ sanivārasiddhi
pratāpalaṁkēśvaraṁ ripumadanamahēśvaraṁ Asahāya cakrava¨rtti rāyanārāyaṇaṁ nissaṁkamallaṁ saṁkama
sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire . tatpāda yugaḷakamaḷasamutpaṁna parāgama
viḷasatpuṇyaṁbijjalō¨rvvīpati vikkarasaru . Ā jagatpra siddhara prasiddhavaṁśāvatāraveṁtene . mone
varataṁbaladoḷamarutuṁ tribhuvanamallana kaṭṭidalagi naṁtesedanācarasa maṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ bhū
cugi tatsahajātarappa nākarasana siṁhabhūbhujana dāsa mahīśana dāmadhāriṇīśvarana cavuṁ
sidudalli siṁgarasanātmajanācugimaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ . pudidire kōṭegaḷbayaloḷaḍḍaṇadiṁ naḍegōṭe
mahābhraghōṣaveṁbudu bhaṭahuṁkṛtaṁ poḍare kālane halmoredappanīgaḷeṁbudu mū
doḷu . siḍilabaḷagakke kuḷikana kuḍudāḍege mūriviṭṭa mārige māṟaṁ paḍavaṇna
gōveneṟavaṇigegeṭṭidu gōvenalaṁbeyenutta hulgaccida ḍaṁtāvaga maḷisidanalla doḍāvagavā
cayabalavananidhi bhōreṁdu kaviye tatkṣaṇadiṁduppina kaṭṭe karagidaṁtuppina kaṭṭe jalapravāha
kaḍārakaṁnanaṁ koṁdavenaggaḷavenipa rājyacihnaṁgaḷa nācugicakrava¨rttitāṁ kuḍe paḍedaṁ . biṁkada
koṁkaṇavillene koṁḍaṁ koṁkaṇavēḷumanaḷa¨rkeyiṁ dācarasaṁ . Iṁtenisi . dorevettācugimaṁ
tadanuja śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ cāvuṁḍanarēśvaraṁ jananutaṁ taṁnaṁdanaru maṁḍaḷēśvara cūḍāma
dhareyaṁ pālisaleṁde gaurige gajāsyaṁ ṣaṇmukhaṁ sītagu ddhuratējaṁ lavabhūbhujaṁ kuśanṛ
pavole lōkōttama¨rppuṭṭida¨rsiriyādēvige vīra bijjalanṛpaṁ vikkayyaneṁbātmajaru . Avaro
siṁdavaṁśyanayyanenalsaṁdubhayakuḷaśuddharā¨rbbhu vana bhuṁbhukana vīra bijjala
tta sāhasōttuṁgaṁgaṁ nirutaṁ puṭṭidanenaluruparā kramaṁ vīra bijja
parākramamanāṁtavōlbijjalanunmathitaripumaṁḍalēśaṁ pṛthuḷaparākramama
bda mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁbhōgāvatīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ siṁdakuḷakamaḷamā¨rttaṁḍanā
nakalpabhūjātaṁ kaḷacurikuḷōdbhave siriyādēvipriya naṁdanaṁ nijarū
maṁ sāhasōttuṁganayyana siṁgaṁ nāmādi samasta praśastisahitaṁ śrīma
ra vīra vikramādityadēvarasanuṁ kisukāḍeppattakkaṁ bāga ḍageyeḷpattakkaṁ haṁgara
kkaṁ nareyaṁgalu haṁneraḍakkavadhipatigaḷenisi rājadhāni yaraṁbare
ja pradhānaṁ maṁḍaḷika daṁḍanāyaka janarājaṁ murāri parabaḷa mahādēva daṁḍanāyakaṁ
mahāgrahāraṁ baṇaṁjadādivaṭṭaṇavekkalavāḍa kuttuṁbitti kaḍakeṟege bijayaṁ geyde
maṁḍanavesegu lōkastuta janamēda(ja)ya bhūkāṁtana dattiyenisi kaḍake
tiṣṭhitadēvāspadadiṁ sūcitavāytaggada kaḍakaṟegagrahāra tiḷakakkeḷeyo
nāḍugaḷiṁ kaḍeya keṟeyiṁ virājisi kaḍakeṟeyene pesaranāḷdu
tiyagrahāraṁ vijayaśrīdayitarinainū¨rvvarināḍaṁ kaḍa keṟe ba
yōgyaṁ seṭṭiyenalayyūvoḷegaḷavaṭṭa jasaṁ negaḷda kaḍakeṟegavaḷavaḍade . ni
vābaṇaṁjada dha¨rmmadoḷaṁ neṟeda neṟeviniṁdainū¨rvvaru . Aṁtu
hāra kaḍakeṟeyūroḍeya pramukhamahājanaṁgaḷainū¨rvva¨rmmū
tiyuktaraṁ vṛttisaṁpattiyuktaraṁ mūḷpa saṁkaḷpadiṁ pradhānaṁ mahadē
ggivāḍa miṇajigegaḷa gāvuṁḍike muṁnavā mahājanaṁgaḷa soṁma
yōnimittaṁ mahājanaupabhōgyayōgyaṁ māḍidanā dha¨rmmamumaṁ dēśa
dhirājalakṣaṇaprayuktanenisi . Ama¨rdoppalu nijavakṣa doḷu ka
rājimukha¨rkkaḷu kadidi¨rcci nilvaraḷeyoḷu tāville nalvīra saṁkamadēva pra
tprabhaṁjanananalu kāvaṇayyaṁ bhūbhṛtpriyamaṁtri pasa¨rvvettaṁ . tadanvayāvatāraveṁ
kulābharaṇarenisalpeṁpuvaḍedareṇba¨rvvipraru . Ā negaḷda gastyakuladoḷu sūnṛta
kanasadaṁ . varaguṇanidhi hoṁnara baṁmarasaṁgaṁ jakkaṇa yyagaṁ puṭṭidarā dhare
gāvaṁ rāyadaṁḍanāyakapeṁḍāranenippa gaḷa bhūpanīye kāvaṇacamū
¨rkkāḷva dēviyene pēḷā¨rkkāvaṇadaṁḍanāthanoḷtū ḍa¨rdduḷivaru . Ade peṁḍāra
¨rmmanaṁgeṭṭirantade peṁḍārana leṁkavotta vada nāṁtonāya[¨rka]ṭṭadeṁbudu vi
suva pesa¨rvvetta naṁdavāḍigeyaṁ sa¨rvvanamasyamāge biṭṭaṁjanapati kuḍe
mūpatitiḷakaṁ śrīnidhi samastavidyāṁbōnidhi tējaya daṁḍanāyakaṁ ne
tradiṁ saṁda gautamagaṁgāṁkamanāṁta puṇyanadiya gōdāvarī dēviya
liyū¨rmmunivararu svātaṁtryasāma¨rtthyadoḷu . Ā gautamana
dinaṁnamaṁ saṁvariparu . Alli varagautamānvayāṁbudhi
yya daṁḍādhīśaṁ . sādhitavairigaḷu kaḷacurikṣitipā nvaya
hātmana sutaṁ subhaṭāgraṇi tējirājadaṁḍādhipanā pratāpiya
tiyoḷu hṛjjātana vallabhegeṇeyane bhūtalavabhimānama
sidaṁ lakṣmīkāṁtaṁ śaśaviśadayaśōdaitaṁ tēji rājadaṁḍādhīśaṁ
ṇeyā¨rppatihitayarenisi peṁpaṁ taḷedaḷu . varaguṇa
naggada tanayaru . janakaṁ bhāyiladaṁḍanāthananya ghaṁ bhāgavve
vaṇacamūnāthaṁ camūnāthamaṁḍanaṁ tējayyanenalu
kṛtsau¨ryyaṁ mṛgarājananivā¨ryyaṁ mi
yoḷaṁ karaṇaṁgaḷa samastadha¨rmmaṁgaḷaṁ svadha
ṇnisa budharakṣāmaṇigaḷu peṁpuvaḍedarā
kramavipa¨ryyayaṁ māḍade vēdadoḷaṁ vyava
digaḷiṁdaṁ sogayikkuṁ . vineyaṁmaṁ
yoḷu purāṇadoḷu nutadha¨rmmaśāstra
ṣṭāna japasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpaṁnaru
bageyiṁ taṁnadhikārada haṁgarage heṁneraḍaṟo
madēvaṁge biṁnahaṁgeysi kāruṇyadāna
lūraṁ mahāpradhānaṁ maydunaṁ tējayya
dēvara saṁnidhiyoḷu sādaprakṣāḷanadhārā
yahuṇise Āgnēyada mēre ba
lahuṁjaka vāyavyada mēra
mahājanaughaThe
Digital edition of SII 15.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
